data.body: AC amendment (gap analysis — missing_error_path): When drift-triggered /dso:implementation-plan re-invocation returns REPLAN_ESCALATE, the drift detection step must feed into the existing REPLAN_ESCALATE cascade machinery (replan_cycle_count, max_replan_cycles) defined in Phase 2. Initialize the cascade counter at the drift detection step if not already set, and route REPLAN_ESCALATE through the same d-replan-collect flow. Document this in the SKILL.md instructions.
